error_signature: The requested webhook is not registred.
title: Webhook not registered error
symptom: When attempting to create or access a webhook, n8n returns a 404 error stating 'The requested webhook is not registred.'
root_cause: The error occurs because the webhook has not been registered in n8n. This can happen if the workflow is not activated or if the webhook is being accessed before it has been registered during a manual execution.
fix_steps: Activate the workflow by toggling the switch in the top right corner
Ensure the webhook is created and registered before making a call
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow to register the webhook before accessing it.
